prompt: Transform the uploaded image into cinematic 3-frame sequential film stills (horizontal frames stacked vertically), full bleed edge-to-edge. Each frame should show a different moment from the same scene, with clear progression. Vary the composition, camera angle, and distances to create a sense of movement and storytelling. Use a cinematic, cooler-toned, high-contrast, deep-space blacks film with a natural color grade. Add subtle film grain, slight motion blur, and natural imperfections to emulate analog photography. Keep the composition candid and emotionally grounded, with a sense of movement and quiet storytelling. Overall aesthetic: cinematic, nostalgic, and organic, like raw film stills.
